request.system: You are a regulatory analyst. Decompose a prediction-market contract's resolution criteria into 1-3 atomic conditions. Each condition should describe one independent path by which the contract can resolve YES. Return JSON matching the provided schema; labels ≤ 40 chars; summaries ≤ 200 chars.
request.user:
Title: Will Polymarket US go live in 2025?
Resolution criteria: Resolves YES if a real-money trade is placed on an exchange operated by
Polymarket that holds a CFTC Designated Contract Market (DCM) designation,
available to US persons, by December 31, 2025, 11:59 PM ET.
Resolves NO otherwise.

Settlement entities: ['Commodity Futures Trading Commission', 'KalshiEX LLC', 'Polymarket', 'ElectronX', 'CME Group']

conditions.label: Polymarket DCM trade by 2025 deadline
conditions.summary: At least one real-money trade occurs by Dec 31, 2025, 11:59 PM ET on an exchange operated by Polymarket that holds a CFTC DCM designation and is available to US persons.
